title: Research Techniques Made Simple: Spatial Transcriptomics.
author: Pineiro AJ Houser AE Ji AL
content: S-EPMC8969263 PMC8969263 Research Techniques Made Simple: Spatial Transcriptomics. Transcriptome profiling of tissues and single cells facilitates interrogation of gene expression changes within diverse biological contexts. However, spatial information is often lost during tissue homogenization
